description_long: This is a dark-colored glass bottle with a tall, cylindrical neck and a slightly wider body, typical of wine or liquor bottles. The front features a white label with a circular logo at the top, a portrait, and several lines of text, suggesting branding and product information. The bottle has a solid, opaque appearance, and the label is the only visible decorative element. The cap is dark and appears to be a cork or similar closure, blending seamlessly with the neck. The bottle's surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light subtly. There are no visible signs of damage, and the bottle appears clean and intact.
description: A dark, glossy glass bottle with a tall neck and a white label featuring branding and a portrait. The bottle is opaque and has a smooth, reflective surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white label with branding, a portrait, and text clearly visible on the bottle's body.
description_view_1: Angled side view with the label partially visible, most of the bottle appears dark and featureless.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the bottle's plain, dark surface with no label or markings visible.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view with the label just barely visible, most of the bottle remains dark.
attribute_label_or_branding: White label on the front with a circular logo at the top, a portrait, and several lines of text in black and red. The label is centered and rectangular.
